## Classes

### <a name="opkssh"></a>`opkssh`

The opkssh class.

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `opkssh` class:

* [`user`](#-opkssh--user)
* [`group`](#-opkssh--group)

##### <a name="-opkssh--user"></a>`user`

Data type: `String`

The user used to install and run opkssh

Default value: `'opksshuser'`

##### <a name="-opkssh--group"></a>`group`

Data type: `String`

The group used to install and run opkssh

Default value: `'opksshuser'`

##### <a name="-opkssh--uid"></a>`uid`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

The user id used to install and run opkssh

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--gid"></a>`gid`

Data type: `Optional[Integer]`

The group id userd to install and run opkssh

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--system_user"></a>`system_user`

Data type: `Boolean`

If the user for opkssh should be created as system user

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-opkssh--logfile_group"></a>`logfile_group`

Data type: `String`

The group of the logfile e.g. that other users can read the logfile without root permissions

Default value: `'adm'`

##### <a name="-opkssh--version"></a>`version`

Data type: `String`

The version of opkssh to install

Default value: `'0.14.0'`

##### <a name="-opkssh--install_dir"></a>`install_dir`

Data type: `String`

The directory to install opkssh into

Default value: `'/opt/opkssh'`

##### <a name="-opkssh--etc_path"></a>`etc_path`

Data type: `String`

The directory to write configs to

Default value: `'/etc'`

##### <a name="-opkssh--configure_sshd"></a>`configure_sshd`

Data type: `Boolean`

If sshd config should be adopted to use opkssh

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-opkssh--reload_sshd"></a>`reload_sshd`

Data type: `Boolean`

If sshd service should be reloaded after changing the config

Default value: `true`

##### <a name="-opkssh--download_url"></a>`download_url`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The download URL for the opkssh binary. If provided, takes priority over download_base

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--download_base"></a>`download_base`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The base URL for downloading opkssh. Used with version to construct full URL. Ignored if download_url is specified

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--architecture"></a>`architecture`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The CPU architecture to download for, typically amd64 or arm64

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--checksum"></a>`checksum`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The checksum type to use when downloading the opkssh binary

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--auth_id_content"></a>`auth_id_content`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The contents of the opkssh auth_id file

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--config_content"></a>`config_content`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The contents of the opkssh config file

Default value: `undef`

##### <a name="-opkssh--providers_content"></a>`providers_content`

Data type: `Optional[String]`

The contents of the opkssh providers file

Default value: `undef`
